final:
module top_module(
    output reg [3:0] out,
    input clk,
    input reset
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'd0;
        end else begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
